meta.description: A conceptual step in a pipeline specification.

loopsTo.description: Step name this step may loop back to.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_04ca89a9_9e31_41c6_a50f_d7a2e3542357" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "consumes" TEXT,
    "produces" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    "loops_to" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_04ca89a9_9e31_41c6_a50f_d7a2e3542357" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_04ca89a99e3141c6_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
